state_pressure.basis: June 5 session overlay — 10Y leading equity; rate-led gap defining condition.

session_context: June 5 session overlay: transitional | emerging; rates leading; medium confidence, emerging stability.

drafts.x:
10Y yield starting to stretch — one more move and the regime flips.
Needs oil to break the range — only then does it matter.

SPX 7,505. 10Y 4.53%. Oil $91.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,618 or below 7,393
• 10Y moves beyond 4.73% or below 4.33%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Transitional | From restrictive
CONFIDENCE: Medium (51/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Emerging

Snapshot — Jun 05, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,505.08   z +1.19
  10Y Yield:      4.534%  z +1.40
  WTI Oil:        91.49   z -0.84

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,505 is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. 10Y yield at 4.53% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $91 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil. Confidence sits at 51/100 — enough for a directional lean but not a high-conviction call.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,618 or below 7,393
• 10Y moves beyond 4.73% or below 4.33%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 5, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s rate-led transitional regime. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.outcome: Regime confirmed restrictive — 10Y sustained above 1.5σ, SPX broke below confirmation threshold within 4 sessions
Gap resolved pro-risk — SPX absorbed rate pressure and extended; 10Y pulled back below 1.0σ
Regime shifted restrictive — rates sustained lead, SPX lost 1.0σ within 6 sessions

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. Rate-led gap flip is the defining condition. Direction resolves at 7,618 and 4.73%. Historical context.
